# Daily Report — 2026-06-16

## Task Completed
Added `approve_change_approval` and `reject_change_approval` tools to change_tools.py.
These tools operate directly on a `sysapproval_approver` record by its sys_id — complementing
`list_change_approvals` and `get_change_approval` (added the previous two days).
- `approve_change_approval`: PATCH `sysapproval_approver/{sys_id}` with `state=approved`; optional `comments` field
- `reject_change_approval`: PATCH `sysapproval_approver/{sys_id}` with `state=rejected` and required `rejection_reason` (stored as `comments`)
- Both return a normalised approval dict via `_format_approval` and include 404 guards
- Both registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- Added `list_change_approvals` and `get_change_approval` (read-only) to the `service_desk` package so
  help desk agents can inspect approval status without write access

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1656
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean (pip-audit run; no new vulnerabilities introduced)

## Files Changed
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py — new `ApproveChangeApprovalParams`, `RejectChangeApprovalParams` models; `approve_change_approval`, `reject_change_approval` functions
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py — export new functions + add to `__all__`
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py — import params + functions; register both tools in registry
- config/tool_packages.yaml — add to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages; add read-only pair to `service_desk`
- tests/test_approve_reject_change_approval.py — 21 new tests

## Next Up

Tomorrow: Add get_change_task tool (GET change_task/{sys_id or CTASK number}; normalised fields)
